---
id: get-all-special-offers
title: "Get special offers across all properties"
description: "Retrieve current special offers and promotional prices across all properties. Returns discounted stays with check-in/check-out dates and offer prices. Use this to highlight deals on a homepage or promotions page."
sidebar_label: "Get special offers across all properties"
hide_title: true
hide_table_of_contents: true
api: 
sidebar_class_name: "get api-method"
info_path: docs/api/booking-brain-developer-api
custom_edit_url: null
---

<Heading
  as={"h1"}
  className={"openapi__heading"}
  children={"Get special offers across all properties"}
>
</Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"get"}
  path={"/developer/properties/specialoffers"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



Retrieve current special offers and promotional prices across all properties. Returns discounted stays with check-in/check-out dates and offer prices. Use this to highlight deals on a homepage or promotions page.

  parameters={undefined}
>
  
</ParamsDetails>
